record.field: Show what actions and tools are available to you

What can you do What tools are available What commands do you know Help Show me your capabilities What actions can you perform What can I ask you What do you support List available tools What functions do you have What are your features What can this AI do Tell me what you can do How can you help me What intents are available What are all the commands Show capabilities What can I do here
Answer a question about how to use the AI assistant or a specific feature

How do I check in a member How do I promote a belt How do I enroll a student How do I cancel a subscription How do I look up a member Explain how check-in works How do I add a new student How does belt promotion work How do I schedule a class Walk me through enrolling someone What's the best way to use this Help me understand how to check attendance
Handles meta questions about AI capabilities, available tools, and how-to guidance. Intercepts "what can you do?" questions before they leak raw tool schema to the user.
